Issues: The image uses a widely recognizable aesthetic (synthwave/cyberpunk cityscape). While this style has commercial appeal, the lack of highly unique compositional elements or extremely high-fidelity rendering might limit its appeal to a general, broad market.

The lighting and composition are effective, but the overall scene, while aesthetically pleasing, is common within the digital art landscape. To maximize commercial sales, the image would benefit from more unique stylistic twists or extremely high resolution/print preparation for high-end commercial use.
